mapper.select: /* AdminUserMapper.selectAdminUser */ SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, A.USER_PWD, A.USER_AUTH, A.BIZ_DIV_CD, A.DEPT_CD, CAST(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(A.USER_TEL), 'RSOS') AS CHAR) AS USER_TEL, CAST(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(A.USER_MAIL), 'RSOS') AS CHAR) AS USER_MAIL, B.CD_CODE_NM AS USER_AUTH_NM, X.SITE_CD_LIST FROM ADMIN_USER A LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, GROUP_CONCAT(site_cd ORDER BY site_cd SEPARATOR ',') AS SITE_CD_LIST FROM admin_user_site GROUP BY user_id) X ON X.user_id = A.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CD_COMMON B ON B.CD_CODE = A.USER_AUTH AND B.cd_div = '003' WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
/* AdminUserMapper.selectAdminUserCount */ SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) FROM ADMIN_USER A WHERE 1=1

/* 특정 고속도로에 소속된 관리자 목록 조회 (자식 선택 시 부모 기준으로 조회) */ SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, A.USER_NM AS userNm, A.USER_AUTH AS userAuth, B.CD_CODE_NM AS userAuthNm, GROUP_CONCAT(AUS.site_cd ORDER BY AUS.site_cd SEPARATOR ',') AS siteCdList FROM site_info S INNER JOIN ADMIN_USER A ON A.USE_YN = 1 INNER JOIN admin_user_site AUS ON AUS.user_id = A.USER_ID AND AUS.site_cd = IFNULL(S.parent_site_cd, S.site_cd) LEFT JOIN CD_COMMON B ON B.CD_CODE = A.USER_AUTH AND B.cd_div = '003' WHERE S.site_cd = #{siteCd} GROUP BY A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, A.USER_AUTH, B.CD_CODE_NM ORDER BY A.USER_NM
mapper.insert: /* AdminUserMapper.insertAdminUser - 관리자 등록 */ INSERT INTO ADMIN_USER ( USER_ID, USER_AUTH, USER_NM, USER_PWD, BIZ_DIV_CD, DEPT_CD, USER_TEL, USER_MAIL, REG_ID, REG_DT, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userAuth}, #{userNm}, #{userPwd}, #{bizDivCd}, #{deptCd}, HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{userTel}, 'RSOS')), HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{userMail}, 'RSOS')), #{inputStaff}, NOW(), 1 );

/* AdminUserMapper.insertAdminUserLog - 관리자 로그 */ INSERT INTO ADMIN_USER_LOG ( log_div, USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_PWD, USER_AUTH, BIZ_DIV_CD, DEPT_CD, USER_TEL, USER_MAIL, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{logDiv}, #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{userPwd}, #{userAuth}, #{bizDivCd}, #{deptCd}, HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{userTel}, 'RSOS')), HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{userMail}, 'RSOS')), #{inputStaff}, NOW() );
mapper.update:
UPDATE ADMIN_USER
USER_NM = #{userNm}, USER_AUTH = #{userAuth},
USER_PWD = #{userPwd},
BIZ_DIV_CD = #{bizDivCd},
BIZ_DIV_CD = NULL,
DEPT_CD = #{deptCd},
DEPT_CD = NULL,
USER_TEL = HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{userTel}, 'RSOS')),
USER_TEL = NULL,
USER_MAIL = HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{userMail}, 'RSOS')),
USER_MAIL = NULL,
UPD_DT = NOW(), UPD_ID = #{updateStaff}
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
